news.title:
Nuvama maintains Buy on Marico with TP ₹900, citing 29% VAHO growth in Q3FY26.
Marico benefits from copra price correction, with stable Bangladesh momentum; Middle East tensions monitored.
news.summary:
Nuvama maintains Buy on Marico with TP ₹900, citing 29% VAHO growth in Q3FY26.
Marico benefits from copra price correction, with stable Bangladesh momentum; Middle East tensions monitored.

news.title:
FMCG majors like HUL, Marico, Dabur actively acquiring D2C brands.
This shift offers clearer exit paths for VC and PE investors.
news.summary:
FMCG majors like HUL, Marico, Dabur actively acquiring D2C brands.

news.title:
Marico Ltd trades near all-time highs, aiming to triple Rs 100 cr digital ARR and boost global foods revenue via D2C expansion.
Q3 FY26 revenue grew 27% to Rs 3,537 cr; net profit rose 12% to Rs 460 cr. Acquisition of Zea Maize to enhance food portfolio.
news.summary:
Marico Ltd trades near all-time highs, aiming to triple Rs 100 cr digital ARR and boost global foods revenue via D2C expansion.
Q3 FY26 revenue grew 27% to Rs 3,537 cr; net profit rose 12% to Rs 460 cr. Acquisition of Zea Maize to enhance food portfolio.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley upgrades Marico to overweight with a target price of ₹934/share.
Godrej Consumer downgraded to equal weight with a target price of ₹1,159/share.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley upgrades Marico to overweight with a target price of ₹934/share.
Godrej Consumer downgraded to equal weight with a target price of ₹1,159/share.

news.title:
Top FMCG advertisers like HUL, P&G, Marico, and Colgate reduced Q3 ad spends by 6%, 17%, 2%, and 8%, respectively.
Experts predict ad spend recovery by Holi, potentially boosting entertainment platform revenues.
news.summary:
Top FMCG advertisers like HUL, P&G, Marico, and Colgate reduced Q3 ad spends by 6%, 17%, 2%, and 8%, respectively.

news.title:
Marico plans strategic digital investments to diversify beyond core India business, focusing on foods and personal care.
Aims 3x-3.5x revenue growth for digital acquisitions by FY30; Beardo and Plix show strong profitability potential.
news.summary:
Marico plans strategic digital investments to diversify beyond core India business, focusing on foods and personal care.
Aims 3x-3.5x revenue growth for digital acquisitions by FY30; Beardo and Plix show strong profitability potential.

news.title:
Marico Ltd aims for Rs.4,000 crore global ARR for digital brands by FY30.
The company targets 15x revenue growth in its foods segment.

news.title:
Marico Ltd announced EVP Akash Banerji's resignation effective May 31, 2026.
Banerji leaves to pursue entrepreneurial ventures; disclosure available on Marico's website.

news.title:
Marico Ltd will hold an investor conference call on Feb 13, 2026, 3:30-4:30 PM IST.
The call will discuss strategic investments in Zea Maize, Cosmix Wellness, and Skinetiq.
news.summary:

news.title:
Marico Ltd has acquired three companies in three weeks, showcasing expansion efforts.
The firm targets premium personal care, health products, and digital-first brands.
news.summary:

news.title:
Marico's subsidiary MSEA to acquire 75% stake in Skinetiq for INR 261.6 Cr.
Deal aims to expand Marico's premium beauty and D2C presence in Vietnam market.
news.summary:

news.title:
Marico Ltd acquires 60% stake in Cosmix Wellness, a digital-first wellness brand.
The deal values Cosmix at approximately Rs. 375 crore, boosting Marico's premium nutrition portfolio.
news.summary:

news.title:
Marico's 4700BC brand aims to triple ARR from INR 140 cr in 3 years.
The company targets 150-200 bps margin improvement, mid-teens profit growth.
